About Us

Who We Are

10 Years of Trusted Overseas Consultancy

Growth Abroad is a leading overseas consultancy specialising in international internships, Europe Work Permits, Australia PR, and Study Abroad programs. Based in Kolkata, we have spent over 10 years building a trusted global network that connects talented individuals with genuine career opportunities worldwide.

We operate under the guidance of registered Migration Agents recognized by the Office of the Migration Agents Registration Authority (MARA), ensuring that our Australia immigration services are professional, compliant, and in line with the latest regulatory requirements.

Our commitment is to deliver transparent, ethical, and result-oriented consultancy — from your first assessment to your final placement.

Growth Abroad operates under the guidance and supervision of registered Migration Agents registered with the Office of the Migration Agents Registration Authority (MARA). We provide professional immigration services utilising our expertise and knowledge of Australian immigration laws and regulations. The final decision regarding visa approvals and permanent residency rests with Australian government authorities. We do not guarantee any specific immigration outcomes or PR approvals.

Transparent Process

No hidden fees. Clear documentation and step-by-step guidance at every stage.

ISO 9001:2015 Certified

Quality management audited by Global Standards. Certificate No. 090705AL04GR, valid until May 2029.

MARA Supervised

Australia immigration services operate under guidance of MARA-registered migration agents.

10 Years of Experience

Hundreds of candidates placed across 10+ countries over a decade of operational excellence.

Our Services

What We Do

End-to-end support for your international journey

Internship Programs

International hospitality and professional training programs in France, Spain, and the USA.

Europe Work Permit

Genuine job placements in hospitality, logistics, and skilled sectors across Europe.

Study Abroad

Master's programs in France with January and September intakes. No mandatory IELTS for many courses.

Australia PR

Permanent residency guidance under MARA-supervised migration agents.

Visa Services

Tourist, business, study, internship, and work permit visa assistance across multiple destinations.
Internship

International Internship Programs

Gain Global Experience. Build a World-Class Career.

Growth Abroad offers structured international internship opportunities in France, Spain, and the United States through professional training and J-1 programs. We support students, graduates, and young professionals in gaining valuable international exposure with leading hotels, restaurants, resorts, and hospitality organizations.

🇫🇷 France

Paid Hospitality Internship / Training (6 Months). Stipend: €669/month. Intakes: Jan & Sep.

🇪🇸 Spain

Hospitality Internship programs with premier European hotels.

🇺🇸 USA

International Cruise Ship Employment. C1/D Crew & Transit Visa. Roles in Food & Beverage, Housekeeping, and more.

Apply Now
Work Permit

Europe Work Permit

Genuine International Jobs. Legal Work Authorization.

Growth Abroad specialises in genuine overseas job placements across Europe in the hospitality, logistics, and skilled sectors. Our team provides complete support — from consultation and documentation to interview preparation and visa processing.

🇲🇹 Malta

Schengen Work Visa for Premium Hotels.

🇱🇺 Luxembourg

2-Year Work Permit. Logistics & Packaging.

🇦🇱 Albania

Skilled Trades (MIG / TIG Welder).

🇲🇰 North Macedonia

Courier & Logistics. €800 NET/month.

🇨🇭 Switzerland

Production & Factory, Hospitality.

🇴🇲 Oman

Middle East Work Placements.

Apply Now
Study Abroad

Study Abroad

World-Class Education. International Career Pathways.

Growth Abroad guides students and graduates through the entire study abroad process — from choosing the right university and program to visa applications and pre-departure preparation.

🇫🇷 France Master's Programs

1-year MSc (Business) & 2-year (Engineering). Up to 20 hours/week work rights. Post-study permit up to 4 years. Many universities accept MOI (IELTS not mandatory).

🇳🇿 New Zealand

Top-tier universities with pathways to international careers.

Enquire Now

Growth Abroad operates under the guidance and supervision of registered Migration Agents registered with the Office of the Migration Agents Registration Authority (MARA). We provide professional immigration services utilising our expertise and knowledge of Australian immigration laws and regulations. The final decision regarding visa approvals and permanent residency rests with Australian government authorities.

Australia PR

Australia Permanent Residency

Your Pathway to a Better Future in Australia

Australia Permanent Residency (PR) offers skilled professionals and eligible applicants the opportunity to live, work, and build a future in Australia permanently. With a strong economy, excellent quality of life, world-class healthcare, and diverse career opportunities, Australia remains one of the most preferred destinations for migrants worldwide.

  • Right to live and work permanently
  • Access to Medicare public healthcare
  • Sponsor eligible family members
  • Pathway to Australian citizenship
Book a Free Assessment
Visa Services

End-to-End Visa Assistance

Comprehensive support for every journey

Internship Visa

Training and internship visa support for France, Spain, and USA programs.

Tourist Visa

Documentation and application support for tourism and leisure visas.

Business Visa

Professional assistance for business travel visas to multiple destinations.

Study Visa

Guidance for student visa applications for Master's and other academic programs.

Europe Work Permit

Legal work authorization support for job placements across European countries.

Australia PR

Permanent residency application support under MARA-supervised agent guidance.

Why Growth Abroad

Why Choose Growth Abroad?

Guiding you to genuine international opportunities with transparency

Free Assessment

Every journey starts with a free, no-obligation career assessment to identify the right path for you.

Genuine Opportunities

We work only with verified employers and institutions. No fake offers, no hidden charges.

End-to-End Support

From consultation and documentation to visa processing and pre-departure — we are with you at every step.

ISO Certified Quality

Our processes are audited and certified to ISO 9001:2015 standards by Global Standards.

Global Network

Strong employer partnerships across Europe, Australia, the USA, and beyond built over 10 years.

Proven Results

Hundreds of successful placements across Malta, Luxembourg, France, Australia, Oman, and more.
